## Signal Palette Documentation

The color system itself is documented in the [signal-palette repository](https://github.com/lewisflude/signal-palette/tree/main/docs):

- **[Philosophy](https://github.com/lewisflude/signal-palette/blob/main/docs/philosophy.md)** - Design principles
- **[Color System Reference](https://github.com/lewisflude/signal-palette/blob/main/docs/color-system-reference.md)** - Complete palette
- **[Technical Specification](https://github.com/lewisflude/signal-palette/blob/main/docs/technical-specification.md)** - Mathematical constraints
